scripts.render: remotion render src/index.ts HiddenWeek ../../assets/stories/hidden-week-story.mp4 --codec=h264 --crf=20 --pixel-format=yuv420p && ffmpeg -y -i ../../assets/stories/hidden-week-story.mp4 -an -c:v copy ../../assets/stories/hidden-week-story.noaudio.mp4 && mv ../../assets/stories/hidden-week-story.noaudio.mp4 ../../assets/stories/hidden-week-story.mp4
